name: Mission Rovee
developer: Sphere Province Games, Jared Bowman, Andrew Everage-Scheible, Jeffrey Harmon, Victoria Moon, Tommy Nguyen, Pandora Roberts
short_description: Control Rovee and complete her mission. Using the terminal and clever pathing, ensure Rovee finishes her mission successfully. Be careful, or she'll run out of battery and her mission will come to an end.
detailed_description:
Rovee's Adventure Awaits You!

Get ready to explore an uncharted planet and find minerals to complete Rovee's mission! Enter commands using the keyboard to command her toward success. But be careful, because Rovee's battery doesn't last very long. Once her battery dies, Rovee's mission comes to an end.

Collect Minerals!

Intel reports that there are golden-like minerals located on the planet, and Rovee is here to collect them for analysis. Use the commands to your advantage so that she can collect the minerals and head back home safely!

Charge Up!

A charger was left for you to use so that Rovee can charge her battery. Use it as much as you can, because that battery won't last forever! Make sure you keep an eye on her battery at all times!




Please, take very good care of Rovee!
